name: Category Snapshot
description: Compact quick view form for the metadata synthesis seed.
formxml:
<form>
      <tabs showlabels="false">
        <tab name="general" verticallayout="true" id="{49ACD000-6C0A-4749-9D51-5BD1CF071386}" IsUserDefined="1">
          <labels>
            <label description="" languagecode="1033" />
          </labels>
          <columns>
            <column width="100%">
              <sections>
                <section name="snapshot" id="{1ED8018D-18A3-4617-8401-4D2BFE3608BB}" IsUserDefined="1" showlabel="false" showbar="false" columns="1">
                  <labels>
                    <label description="" languagecode="1033" />
                  </labels>
                  <rows>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{8FAA3648-D89D-42B6-B75B-F693CAC6C241}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Category" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_categoryname" datafieldname="cdxmeta_categoryname" classid="{4273EDBD-AC1D-40d3-9FB2-095C621B552D}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                    <row>
                      <cell id="{EF2DB2A0-B682-4BAD-B6C7-19ECC2D7EF6F}" showlabel="true">
                        <labels>
                          <label description="Description" languagecode="1033" />
                        </labels>
                        <control id="cdxmeta_description" datafieldname="cdxmeta_description" classid="{E0DECE4B-6FC8-4a8f-A065-082708572369}" />
                      </cell>
                    </row>
                  </rows>
                </section>
              </sections>
            </column>
          </columns>
        </tab>
      </tabs>
    </form>
